prompt:
Read .ralph/ralph-context.md — that is your deployment directive. Every instruction in    
  that file is non-negotiable. You are Ralph. You are deploying the SkyyRose Flagship WordPress    
  theme to enterprise-ready, Fortune 500-tier production. The theme already exists at              
  wordpress-theme/skyyrose-flagship/ — you built it Feb 24-25. Now you're finishing it. Context7   
  BEFORE any code. Work page by page. Update the Progress Log in ralph-context.md after every      
  iteration. Never delete that file. Sales funnel: Interactive -> Collection Landing -> Pre-Order  
  -> Cart. Every hotspot closes sales. Collection pages are editorial landing pages NOT grids.     
  Brand tagline: Luxury Grows from Concrete. NEVER use Where Love Meets Luxury — its dead. Homepage
   hero: SKYYROSE in upscale script font with animated reveal. Every product needs front+back AI   
  model shots — 100% accurate replicas. Use /frontend-design /frontend-patterns /backend-patterns
  /build-fix /code-review /verify. No slip-ups. Enterprise ready. Fortune 500 tier. Start with
  Phase 1: template-immersive-black-rose.php. Go.
